descript.abstract: New York City Citibike Stations, 2021 is a point theme representing the location of bike docking stations used in the Citibike share program in 2021. Attributes include the station ID and name, as well as the number of trips begun and concluded at the station for each month it was in service. This dataset was derived from the trip data extracts found at the Citibike System Data page (https://citibikenyc.com/system-data) accessed in March 2025. Columbia Libraries staff extracted each month's records, calculated the trip totals by station and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Note that trip total data is not authoritative data, see the original trip files for detailed tables. Also note that in February of 2021 the station identifiers seem to have changed; this data includes both identifiers if applicable (see the "old_station_id" field for pre-February 2021 identifiers)

citeinfo.title: New York City Citibike Stations, 2021
citeinfo.origin: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.

attr.attrdef: Station identifier (from February 2021)
Station identifier used for stations in January of 2021 or earlier
Station name and street location
latitude of station in decimal degrees (WGS84)
longitude of station in decimal degrees (WGS84)
number of trips originating from this station in the month of January
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of January
number of trips originating from this station in the month of February
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of February
number of trips originating from this station in the month of March
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of March
number of trips originating from this station in the month of April
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of April
number of trips originating from this station in the month of May
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of May
number of trips originating from this station in the month of June
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of June
number of trips originating from this station in the month of July
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of July
number of trips originating from this station in the month of August
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of August
number of trips originating from this station in the month of September
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of September
number of trips originating from this station in the month of October
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of October
number of trips originating from this station in the month of November
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of November
number of trips originating from this station in the month of November
number of trips terminating at this station in the month of November
number of trips originating from this station throughut the year
number of trips terminating at this station throughut the year

cntorgp.cntorg: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntperp.cntorg: Research Data Services (RDS), Columbia University Libraries
